use_cases: SaaS product landing pages with integrated navigation
Marketing and promotional website headers with mobile menu support
Dark-themed landing page top sections for software products
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero section component with integrated header navigation, responsive mobile hamburger menu toggle, and hover effects on navigation links. Features a clean, minimalist dark design with white text on black background, suitable for SaaS landing pages and product marketing sites. Includes smooth transition animations and click-to-reveal mobile navigation.
